name: Reuben Meatloaf (Microwave)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all meat mixture ingredients in a medium bowl.
2. Press half of the mixture into the bottom of a loaf pan. Make a slight indentation lengthwise down the center of the meatloaf.
3. Combine all filling mixture and put it in the indentation.
4. Top with the remaining meat mixture, pressing to enclose the filling and sealing the edges.
5. Cook on HIGH (100%) for 13-18 minutes or until firm and the internal temperature reaches 145°F.
6. Let stand covered for 5 minutes.
